title: Football Coaching Internship (Trial Development Program-no experience needed)
description:
Football Coaching Internship (Trial Development Program-no experience needed)

📩 Apply via Email: hiring@ministryoffootball.com.sg


Are you passionate about football coaching and eager to play a role in shaping Singapore’s football scene?

Ministry of Football (MOF) is offering an exciting coaching internship—an excellent opportunity to gain firsthand experience in football coaching, education, and the industry’s commercial landscape. As an intern, you will assist at the MOF Academy, where children aged 5-14 years are trained by our experienced coaches.


🔹 Develop hands-on coaching skills

🔹 Gain insight into Singapore’s football ecosystem

🔹 Work with a team of dedicated professionals


🌐 Learn More About Us:

📍 Website

📘 Facebook

📸 Instagram


📌 How to Apply:

Interested candidates must submit a resume and cover letter via email to hiring@ministryoffootball.com.sg. Only applications received via email will be considered.

postedCompany.description:
MOF IS SINGAPORE’S TOP 11-A-SIDE FOOTBALL LEAGUES, CUPS & COMPETITIONS ORGANIZER!

Well-organized and co-ordinated: no venue mix-ups or miscommunication
Deliver what we promise: weekly games are weekly games, no gaps (save for postponements)
Easily reachable and responsive hotlines
Professional and clear in our communication
Well-covered by photographers to highlight your football journey
Prepares for contingencies, such as standby referees etc. 
Fast & efficient in dealing with problems
Happy to hear feedback with humility
Firm in the enforcement of rules & regulations (afterall football is a sport), but fair in making judgments
